title: RGNUL announces partnership with Mentblue for placement guidance
description: Rajiv Gandhi National University of Law, Punjab (RGNUL) has partnered with Mentblue to strengthen student placements.Co-founded by former Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas lawyers Prafful Goyal and Ashutosh Singh, Mentblue will assist RGNUL students with resources and direct support.As per a press release, RGNUL students will gain direct access to Mentblue's support in the following format:Personalised recruitment preparation: Students will receive personalised 1-on-1 guidance including detailed CV
